name: Vivo Origin OS 6 - First Things To Do! ( 20 Tips, Tricks & Hidden Features )
snippet: Vivo have refreshed and renamed their FunTouch operating system. It now goes by the name Origin OS6 and it's running on Android 16.

name: Vivo have removed some adb commands in the latest Origin 6
snippet: I emailed the dev and we troubleshooted the issue. It turns out Vivo have removed the adb command to change the material theme colours via adb.
